SessionStart.command: echo '🏥 HCM Time-Off Sync — session started' && node -v && echo 'Node should be 20.x — run: nvm use 20.19.4 if not' && test -n "$NODE_ENV" && echo "NODE_ENV=$NODE_ENV" || echo '⚠️  NODE_ENV not set'

Stop.command: echo '⚠️  Before committing: run npm run typecheck && npm test'
